Name: UMovieSceneSection
Description: Base class for movie scene sections

Variables.Name: StartTime
Variables.Description: The start time of the section

Variables.Name: EndTime
Variables.Description: The end time of the section

Variables.Name: RowIndex
Variables.Description: The row index that this section sits on

Variables.Name: OverlapPriority
Variables.Description: This section's priority over overlapping sections

Variables.Name: bIsActive
Variables.Description: Toggle whether this section is activeinactive

Variables.Name: bIsInfinite
Variables.Description: Toggle to set this section to be infinite

Variables.Name: PreRollTime
Variables.Description: The amount of time to prepare this section for evaluation before it actually starts.

Variables.Name: PostRollTime
Variables.Description: The amount of time to continue 'postrolling' this section for after evaluation has ended.

Variables.Name: bIsLocked
Variables.Description: Toggle whether this section is lockedunlocked
